import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Create a post"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/posts"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



`uploadedAssetUrls` must be paths returned by the
[upload endpoint](/developers/api-reference/upload-files) (`/uploads/...`)
or Immich proxy paths for an album linked to **this** post's group —
arbitrary URLs are rejected. `latitude` and `longitude` must be
provided together.

Pass `groupIds` instead of `groupId` to **cross-post**: with 2 or more
target groups, the server creates one linked copy of the post per
group. For the author it behaves as a single post — editing or
deleting it edits/deletes every copy — but comments, reactions, and
favorites stay scoped to each group's own copy, and other members can
never tell it was cross-posted. Every target group must be one you
belong to, or the whole request is rejected with no post created.
Photos sourced from a linked media album (Immich/local) are copied
server-side into Famlin's own upload storage at post time so every
target group can see them without gaining access to the source
album; direct uploads are shared as-is.


<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

</ParamsDetails>

  {...require("./create-post.RequestSchema.json")}
>
